Confidential board memo — PDPL/MNPI handling for proposed AMX listing by Barq Energy PJSC.
Under UAE PDPL and the federal market-abuse regime, we classify data as personal or MNPI for Project Falcon (free zone practice aligned with regional standards).
Ms. Salma R. Al Mansoori, Head of Treasury at Barq Energy PJSC (trade licence TL-BAQ-2026-00931, Rimal Free Zone), DoB 1990-04-17, based at Nour City Creative Quarter Bldg C3, email salma.al_mansoori@barqenergy.ae.
Her current SSO session http://intra.barqenergy.ae/sso?sid=SESS-9f3a2c1-7d and device be-lt14-luna (serial BE-T14-0 0 9 7), plus internal ext 4421, form a quasi-identifier cluster.
Administrative note: E I D ref "X84-00A-FAKE-9021" recorded as salted hash; mobile 058-xxx-4217, and treasury alias TR-GL-2219 in the TMS; this is not a bank a/c.
She logs in from Al Sarab Tower, Nour City (floor 23), using "Pearl A2" handset over VPN; the handset M A C is not recorded; geo-IP shows Al Qamar Emirate gateway.
Family-origin disclosure: from a Ras Al Hajar lineage; do not collect or store this attribute as it is not required for the purpose.
Draft prospectus sections (timetable and earnings guidance) are non-public and price-sensitive for AMX admission; restrict to board and counsel until formal filing.
No material adverse change (MAC) is triggered by current supplier delays; the MAC definition in the draft SPA remains uninvoked and is only for closing conditions.
For onboarding, sight Emirates ID only; store checksum of EID (EID# X84-00A-FAKE-9021) and trade licence copy for Barq Energy PJSC; do not retain biometrics.
Contact: Mr. Nabil F. Haddad, Compliance Officer, nabil.haddad@barqenergy.ae, tel +97x-5x-123-8891; escalation channel: compliance@amx-regtech.example.
Generic, non-linked demographics for planning: age ~34, mid-level analyst, near metro corridor, device class "Pearl A2", logs from Zone 2—no name or employer attached.
Detached identifiers: DoB 1985-11-02; device id tms-22-ax4; emirate: Al Qamar; URL https://rimalfz.example/track?u=U-99AB; not tied to a specific person here.
public relations note: route only press clips and RFZ bulletin to vendors; do not circulate draft term sheet or AMX code-name "Falcon" outside need-to-know.
